name: github-tools
description: Codex-native GitHub workflows for pull requests, issue-linked branch analysis, and documentation updates.

interface.shortDescription: Pull request and docs workflows for GitHub.
interface.longDescription: GitHub Tools gives Codex reusable workflows for preparing pull requests, linking changes to issues, running quality checks before PR creation, and keeping README and docs content aligned with code changes.
defaultPrompt: Use github-workflows to prepare a draft PR.
Use github-workflows to update docs for this change.
